message:
feat(fp-frame): add agg, applymap, transform, corr, cov, nlargest, nsmallest, reindex

DataFrame: agg() for named per-column aggregation, applymap() for
element-wise transformation, transform() as shape-preserving variant,
corr()/cov() for pairwise correlation/covariance matrices,
nlargest()/nsmallest() for top-N row selection, value_counts_per_column()
for column-wise unique counts, reindex() for label-based reindexing.
Series: corr()/cov_with() for pairwise Pearson correlation and covariance.
Includes 13 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
